rules.description: Caps Lock: tap = Escape, hold = Left Ctrl
Right Cmd: hold = Navigation Layer ON

manipulators.description: Left and Right Shift together -> Caps Lock
Right and Left Shift together -> Caps Lock

rules.description: left_arrow to right_control if helded down
Capslock -> esc; On held down: Capslock & Return -> left_option
Same side modifier (for specified keys): cmd -> cmd+opt+ctrl; opt -> cmd+opt; ctrl -> cmd+ctrl
right_alt+<char> -> command + control + option (for right side)
Neo2 mod 3 and layer 4. Rule applied to all keyboards.
Neo2 mod 4: Map ↖ to Home and ↘︎ to End in terminal apps, remote desktop apps and virtual machines.  (move this rule above other Neo2 rules).
Toggle caps_lock by pressing left_shift + right_shift at the same time
